[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Charge] Count

descs.desc:
[StartBattle] To self and (highest Reson.) allies with [Charge]: apply [ChargeLoad] equal to [Charge] on self
(Max 5 other allies)
[WhenUse] At 2+ [Charge] and 7~14 [Charge] Count, consume all [Charge] Count on self to gain Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] Consume 15 [Charge] Count to gain Coin Power +1
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] If this Skill consumed 15 [Charge] Count on use, inflict 2 [Burst]
[OnSucceedAttack] Gain (5 - [Charge]) [Charge] Count (Min 0)

1111001.name: Overcharge / Cleanup Order
1111001.desc:
Gain 1 [Charge] every time this unit consumes 10 cumulative [Charge] Count in this Encounter
Turn End: Apply 1 [ParryingResultUp] next turn to ([Charge]) W Corp. employees, including this unit, in reverse Deployment order (max: 5 allies)

1111021.name: Refraction
1111021.desc: 1 ally who has the most [Charge] Count at Turn Start: deal +10% damage with Skills that consumed 7+ [Charge] Count (once per turn)
